meaning: n.妥协,折衷v.妥协,折衷,危及...的安全
examples: I refuse to compromise my principles.
Neither side is prepared to compromise.
Compromise is an inevitable part of life.
Hence, this entirely reasonable suggestion for a compromise: A mini version of Flash that only handles video.
One of their leaders declared: "We repudiate the Dail", the Irish parliament, which accepted the compromise agreement.
